case.title: READEY v. ST. LOUIS COUNTY WATER CO.

opinion.h: READEY v. ST. LOUIS COUNTY WATER CO., 371 U.S. 8 (1962)
READEY ET AL. v. ST. LOUIS COUNTY WATER CO. ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSOURI. No. 105. Decided October 8, 1962.
opinion.p: Richard E. Crowe, Dan D. Weiner and William J. Becker for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE GOLDBERG took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
